youtube_items.summary: so you want to learn artificial intelligence then this video is for you I'm going to provide you with a complete roadmap that I would follow if I had to start over today on my artificial intelligence journey and now for context I started studying artificial intelligence back in 2013 10 years ago and over the past years I've been working as a freelance data scientist helping my clients with various end-to-end data science and artificial intelligence Solutions and applications I also share all of this knowledge and my journey on this YouTube channel which as of today has over 25 000 subscribers and at the end of this video I will also provide you with a resource completely for free where you can follow all of these steps to complete roadmap even with training videos and instructions so make

youtube_items.title: [YT] Turn your skills + AI into a career in 2025 | 3 future-ready jobs you...
youtube_items.summary: Hi all, my name is Shami Shonne, speaker, trainer, and your favorite digital cousin. Earlier today, I dropped a quick short about three AI powered jobs that are showing up right now. Where did I get them from? My head. And based on comments, DMs, and shares that quick, it's clear people are ready for a little bit more. So, let's break them down. These are people centered skill-based roles for folks who know how to connect, communicate, and adapt. And yes, AI is part of it. But the real value is you. Let's start with this one. AI augmented talent brand specialist. This is for the person who loves spotlighting other people. raw_items.title: Education
raw_items.summary: Education is the transmission of knowledge and skills and the development of character traits. Formal education happens in a complex institutional framework, like public schools. Non-formal education is also structured but occurs outside the formal schooling system, while informal education is unstructured learning through daily experiences. raw_items.title: Learning
raw_items.summary: Learning is the process of acquiring new understanding, knowledge, behavior, skills, values, attitudes, and preferences. The ability to learn is possessed by humans, other animals, and some machines. There is also evidence for some kind of learning in certain plants.
